OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Michael Begert.; Clerk: sravinantapricha ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center, is present. Represented by Justin McBride
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Deforest Wood, is present.
Attorney, Andrew Azarmi , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Judge Begert, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 514, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-26-2011 is vacated.
